concepts.name: connectivity
concepts.definition: Adjacency policy joining cells into components.

concepts.name: objecthood
concepts.definition: A bounded component interpretation of non-background cells.

concepts.name: object selection
concepts.definition: A deterministic predicate or unique selector over scene objects.

concepts.name: spatial relation
concepts.definition: A finite relation between two scene objects.

concepts.name: constructive rendering
concepts.definition: Rendering selected objects to an input-sized or bounding-box canvas.

concepts.name: quantity
concepts.definition: Bounded counts used as explicit parameters.

concepts.name: symmetry
concepts.definition: Potential invariance under reflection or rotation.
concepts.notes: No symmetry observer or solver operation is claimed by this seed.

concepts.name: containment
concepts.definition: One object lies within a closed boundary of another.

concepts.name: negative space
concepts.definition: Background regions treated as candidate structure.

concepts.name: semantic role
concepts.definition: A hypothesis such as marker, template, container, source, or destination.
concepts.notes: Roles are vocabulary only; no role assignment is performed.

capabilities.description: Segment a grid into canonical same-colour non-background components.
Repeat one uniquely selected object using an explicitly bounded count.
